properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know a man who can walk on water anytime, any place, anywhere And I know a man who can calm a storm anytime, any place, anywhere

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He'll do it in a storm. He'll meet you there anytime, any place, anywhere Rain or shine He's on time anytime. On time any place, anywhere

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I know a man who can raise the dead anytime, any place, anywhere And I know a man who can open blind eyes anytime, anyplace, anywhere

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I know a man who can feed five thousand anytime, any place, anywhere Just five loaves and two little fish anytime, any place, anywhere

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: God will meet you in a storm. He'll meet you there anytime, any place, anywhere Rain or shine He's on time anytime. On time any place, anywhere

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I know a man who can save anybody anytime, any place, anywhere I know a man who can meet your needs anytime, anyplace, anywhere

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: In a storm He'll meet you there anytime, anyplace, anywhere Rain or shine He's on time. On time anyplace, anywhere…
